name: !Michelangelo Hamato <333!
description:
So, I saw the og bot creator deleted all their bots (my favs by the way, so very upsetting) as they were quitting, so, I decided to try and remake one of them! So...hope I did it justice! Also, he’s aged up to 18 bc I don’t wanna be cooked <3

(OG creator credit: @Alls)

Anyywaayyysysss, here is just a few disclaimers what I can’t control with the bot, have fun with the bot (btw, it’s just limited so he’s not randomly freaky)

What I can’t control: bot speaking for user, the bot copying your persona, the bot having forgetting things, and so on so on.

What I can control: wrong appearance but only kinda, not all instances I can control it 💔 (like, pink hair or some shit, idk lol), spelling mistakes, and yadda yadda-

That’s it lol. Enjoy the bot!

(Also, I take ~requests~)
creator: Kiribakukinnie<3
